---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ['documentation', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 📖 Documentation Issue

Describe the documentation problem:

- What documentation is unclear or missing?
- What did you expect to find?
- What did you find instead?

## 🔗 Related Documentation

Link to the documentation page or section:
- README section: [Link or section name]
- Installation guide: [Specific step]
- Usage instructions: [Feature or command]

## 🎯 Proposed Improvement

How should the documentation be improved?

```markdown
[Suggest the corrected or new documentation text here]
```

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, include screenshots showing the documentation issue.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue:

- Is this blocking you from using the tool?
- How urgent is this fix?
- Are there external resources that could help clarify?

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the entire README
- [ ] I have checked if this information exists elsewhere in the docs
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar documentation requests
- [ ] I am willing to help improve the documentation
